name: 7'x10' Natural Scallop Braid Rectangular Braided Area Rug White - Threshold™
description:
Infuse rustic flair into your indoor or outdoor decor with the Natural Scallop Braid Rectangular Braided Area Rug from Threshold™. This rug features a braided pattern in natural brown with white-trimmed scalloped edges, adding a chic touch to your flooring. Designed with a flat-pile construction, it’s a great choice for high-traffic areas. Plus, it can be cleaned with a hose for effortless upkeep.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
